name: OpenAI API (GPT)
free_tier: Free $5 credit on signup; GPT-3.5-turbo extremely cheap (~$0.002/1K tokens)
best_use: Writing book descriptions, blog posts, email sequences, ad copy, and sales pages for PLT Press

name: Google Gemini API
free_tier: Free tier: 60 requests/min, 1.5M tokens/day on Gemini 2.0 Flash
best_use: Market research, competitor analysis, summarizing long documents, and content ideation

name: Hugging Face Inference API
free_tier: Free tier with rate limits; access to 200K+ models including text, image, audio
best_use: Sentiment analysis on reviews, text classification, and testing niche AI models

name: Stability AI (Stable Diffusion)
free_tier: 25 free credits on signup; community models free via Hugging Face
best_use: Generating book covers, social media graphics, blog post images, and ad creatives

name: Groq API
free_tier: Free tier: 30 req/min on Llama 3 70B, 30K tokens/min
best_use: Rapid content drafting, real-time chatbot responses, and bulk text processing

name: Competitive Soul
best_use: Analyzing OKR, KPI, and competitor models to ensure PLT domination

name: Product Soul
best_use: Turning raw content factory output into scalable digital products
